goal: Build a macOS menu bar app for tracking PR activity over configurable time windows

target_users: A developer who wants quick menu bar visibility into recent pull request volume by repo.
non_goals: Full GitHub API integration until the popover workflow and data model are proven.
Release signing, notarization, or distribution packaging during the scratchwork phase.
quality_bar: Every iteration must leave a runnable macOS app.
Data transformations must be covered by focused tests.
Swift files must remain under the 300-line guardrail.
allowed_scope: SwiftUI menu bar UI, local sample data, app model, tests, CI, and loop documentation.

completed.summary: Imported scratch PR activity data into the app model, added window filtering, repository inclusion toggles, refresh timestamp behavior, and a stacked chart in the menu bar popover.
Persisted the selected time window and included repositories using a UserDefaults-backed settings store.
Added tappable chart buckets and a selected-bucket repository breakdown.
Introduced a PR activity provider protocol with static and JSON-backed implementations.
Added persisted refresh interval settings, refresh policy tests, and provider-backed manual refresh behavior.
Added an empty activity state and recovery action when all repositories are excluded or no visible activity remains.
Documented the conservative GitHub integration plan for environment-token auth, repository discovery, activity fetching, and rate-limit-safe refresh behavior.
Added a GitHub API request builder for authenticated repository discovery requests with focused unit tests.
Added GitHub repository decoding and mapping into RepositoryActivity values with deterministic colors and default empty buckets.
Added a fixture-backed GitHub activity provider skeleton that discovers pullable repositories through an injectable transport.
Persisted known repository IDs so settings preserve exclusions for known repos while keeping newly discovered repos included by default.
Added a refresh coordinator and wired scheduled daily refresh checks into the menu bar popover lifecycle.
Added user-visible refresh failure state so manual and scheduled refresh errors keep previous activity with an explanatory banner.
Added a URLSession-backed GitHub API transport with HTTP status handling and URLProtocol-based tests.
Added provider factory selection so PR_MENU_BAR_GITHUB_TOKEN switches the app from sample data to the GitHub provider path.
Added GitHub merged pull request search request construction with date range query coverage.
Added decoding for GitHub merged pull request search results, including merged_at date validation.
Added deterministic Sunday-start weekly bucket generation and merged PR date counting.
Updated the GitHub provider to fetch merged PR search results per discovered repo and populate weekly activity counts.
Decoded GitHub search pagination metadata so over-limit merged PR result sets can be detected.
Fetched additional GitHub search pages for high-volume repositories when total_count exceeds the first page.
Rejected incomplete GitHub merged PR search responses so partial activity data is surfaced as a refresh failure.
Accepted GitHub merged_at timestamps with and without fractional seconds.
Trimmed environment tokens before provider selection so whitespace-only tokens keep the sample provider path.
Documented local usage for the live GitHub-backed provider path and its current scope.
Added explicit GitHub request timeouts and recorded loop learnings for the live-provider batch.
Added visible sample-vs-GitHub data source status to the popover header and provider selection model.
Reused one provider selection during app startup so initial load, UI status, and refresh share the same provider.
Added regression coverage proving settings snapshots prune repository IDs that disappear after refresh.
Paginated GitHub repository discovery until a short page is returned.
Decoded GitHub rate-limit reset headers into HTTP transport errors.
Formatted refresh failures with GitHub rate-limit reset times when available.
Displayed next scheduled refresh timing in the popover footer.
Disabled manual refresh while a refresh is running and reflected the in-progress state in the button label.
Guarded scheduled refresh with the same in-progress state so timer refreshes do not duplicate active refresh work.
Stopped GitHub merged PR pagination when a search page returns no items and covered the case with a regression test.
Covered the GitHub provider path where discovered repositories have no pull access so no search requests are issued.
Documented current live GitHub data source status, refresh, and rate-limit reset behavior in the README.

open_findings.text: Live GitHub mode is selected only by environment token; there is not yet in-app configuration or credential storage.

candidate_tasks.title: Extract shared refresh-start guard to reduce app refresh duplication
Add refresh status detail to the popover footer

assumptions.text: Initial state was generated by autopilot-loop CLI. Charter should be refined by the agent before implementation.
Scratch HTML data is weekly; one-day and one-week windows currently show the latest weekly bucket until daily data exists.

judge.reason: README behavior docs now match the current live provider and refresh UX; next useful work is reducing duplicated refresh guard logic in the app entry point.
judge.next_focus: Extract shared refresh-start guard to reduce app refresh duplication.
